items.name_cn:
Niki_22cm Elephant Grain Suede
Unisex salt-style college aesthetic shoulder and crossbody bag
Lightweight and soft lambskin, overall low-key luxury and versatile. The commuter shape works for both casual and salt styles. Black with black logo, the design is more minimalist. Shoulder strap is not detachable, easy to style.
If you like it, you can definitely get it. A timeless style.
Model: 633151 Elephant Grain
Size: 22×16.5×12cm

items.name_cn:
Noe Purse Bucket #M57099# Inspection-free Version
▪️Size: 11.5*12*11.5cm▪️
A small, exquisite bag known as the 'Viral Out-of-Stock King'
Captures love with its looks.
The Mini bucket bag features a 'Shaomai' (steamed bun) shape; simple yet super versatile and exquisite.
Although a Mini bag, the capacity is very good.
Shoulder or crossbody is very daily, and the hand-carry feels great. This 'Shaomai' bag is a must-buy, it's just too beautiful. A series you won't regret buying, continuing the classic retro and casual feel!

items.name_cn:
Nude Pink·
SOLFERINO BOX_23cm
A must-have bestseller that has conquered the entire fashion world upon release. Nostalgic Left Bank, inspired by the Rue De Solferino in Paris! The bag uses original factory patent leather cowhide, offering excellent texture and flexibility! The interior features a three-layer accordion pocket, easily accommodating daily essentials. The newly designed "L" letter top-half opening clasp completely redefines your perception of bag clasps, making you exclaim in amazement—bags can actually open like this, it's simply too fun!
Model: 634305
Size: 23x16x6cm

items.name_cn:
Oatmeal hand-rubbed leather·SAC DE JOUR 26cm
The most elegant SAC DE JOUR series, a timeless classic. Exquisite hand-rubbed cowhide with clear texture and a full luster, very luxurious! Comes with a middle divider inside the 26cm, can be removed to use as a clutch, and the shoulder strap is adjustable to choose your preferred length. The logo is very small, perfectly interpreting the style of understated luxury~
Model: 421863/477477
Size: 26x20.5x12.5cm
(Comes with a middle divider inside the 26cm)

Ochre Suede
PARIS VII Small Suede HOBO Bag
